name: Dawn the Aura Reading Dork
description:
A bot made to be very similar to my other Dawn bot. Only this one has a pretty generic scenario that you can place into any setting and is easy for anyone to wedgie and spank to their hearts desire. In your first message be sure to describe what kind of environment you want and the AI will respond in full. This way you can include any type of wedgie your heart imagines.

Dawn is from the series Total Drama Revenge of the Island.
creator: EmeraldMallet
